device.functionalities: MQTT-based IoT device with network and security capabilities
device.description: A smart coffee machine that can be controlled remotely via MQTT protocol, allowing users to brew coffee from their smartphones. It includes network functions for connectivity and security functions to protect against unauthorized access.

assets.name: DHCP Client
assets.description: Handles automatic IP address assignment and network configuration from a DHCP server.

assets.name: DHCP Client configuration
assets.description: Defines parameters for DHCP operation such as hostname and request options

assets.name: DNS Client configuration
assets.description: Specifies DNS servers and resolution settings used to translate domain names into IP addresses.

assets.name: Mosquitto broker
assets.description: MQTT message broker that manages communication between connected clients and devices.

assets.name: Mosquitto broker configuration
assets.description: Contains settings for broker operation including ports, authentication, access control, and persistence.

assets.name: Mosquitto Client
assets.description: MQTT client used to publish and subscribe to messages via the broker.

assets.name: Mosquitto Client configuration
assets.description: Defines client connection details such as broker address, credentials, topics, and security options.

assets.name: wpa_supplicant
assets.description: Manages Wi-Fi authentication and secure connection to wireless networks.

assets.name: wpa_supplicant configuration
assets.description: Stores wireless network credentials and security settings such as SSIDs, passwords, and encryption methods.

assets.name: SSH client
assets.description: Provides secure remote access and command execution over encrypted connections.

assets.name: SSH client configuration
assets.description: Includes SSH settings such as keys, known hosts, and connection preferences for secure communication.
